title: The AI Society Simulation That Collapsed in 4 Days 💀
summary: A YouTube video from Better Stack describes an experiment in which an AI-powered society simulation failed dramatically within four days. The exact mechanisms of the collapse are highlighted through the video title and sensational framing.
